prediction.reasoning: For a 6-day prediction of IBM stock, I used a random walk model with drift based on typical large-cap technology stock volatility. IBM has historically shown moderate volatility (~20-25% annualized) as a mature tech company. The point estimate assumes no expected drift over the short 6-day period. Confidence intervals are calculated using a daily volatility of approximately 1.5%, which translates to a 6-day standard deviation of about 3.7%. The intervals widen appropriately for higher confidence levels using standard normal distribution quantiles.
